name: Pulse
summary: First public release — calm habit tracking, focus timer, insights, widgets, and on-device backup.

ios.notes: Live Activities and home widget require App Group group.com.pulse.pulse

features: Today habit grid with week/month calendar and greetings
Focus timer — Pomodoro or free, Cupertino length picker
Live Activities (iOS Dynamic Island / lock screen) and Android focus notification
Insights — weekly completion, check-in bars, focus minutes
Onboarding with optional name and starter habits
Settings — haptics, export/restore backup, reset data

changelog.text: Initial Pulse habit tracker and focus app
Home widgets and Live Activities for focus sessions
Focus Finish records elapsed time correctly
Insights/Focus refresh when switching tabs; Pomodoro length syncs from Focus
Starter habit dedupe; optional onboarding name
Cupertino Pomodoro length picker on Focus
README with Today, Focus, and Insights screenshots

signing.android: debug keys (replace with release keystore before store upload)
signing.ios: requires Apple Developer signing for device/TestFlight
